svg.title: Pistol Tracker Project Map
svg.desc: Overview of all features built in the Pistol Tracker app
svg.text: Single-file HTML/JS app · No server · No framework · Runs in Safari · PWA on iPhone
Sessions · Firearms · Settings · All structured data
Target images · Insurance photos · Unlimited size
Planned sessions · Visual distinction · Convert to logged · Checklist with categories
Show all firearms for multi-gun sessions · Pending test
